title: Forever Just

sections.label: Intro
lines: Beneath the heavens’ silent gaze,
We lift our voices, hearts ablaze.
In shadows deep, Your justice reigns,
Through fleeting joy and bitter pains.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: We speak of wonders You ordain,
Your hands hold stars, Your power remains.
The earth shall tremble at Your might,
Yet mercy falls with morning light.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, the wicked rise, the proud will fall,
Your truth resounds, a sovereign call.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your cup of wrath and mercy blends,
It turns the tides, it breaks, it mends.
To You we bow, Your name we raise,
Forever just, through endless days.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The horns of pride You shatter low,
The meek shall see Your glory grow.
No king shall stand apart from grace,
Your justice shines on every face.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: You judge the earth, the scales align,
Through darkness deep, Your light will shine.
The righteous sing, their voices soar,
Your love endures forevermore.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your cup of wrath and mercy blends,
It turns the tides, it breaks, it mends.
To You we bow, Your name we raise,
Forever just, through endless days.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Through fleeting joy and bitter pains,
Beneath the heavens, Your justice reigns.

epigraph: and none of the men of might have found their hands
styleNote: Minimalist Piano With Soft · Brooding Percussion
